steps.title: Write each blue-bead count
steps.content: In the first container, $40\%$ of $x$ beads are blue, so the blue-bead count is $0.4x$. In the second container, $60\%$ of $y$ beads are blue, so the blue-bead count is $0.6y$.

steps.title: Represent at least five hundred
steps.content:
Together, the containers have at least $500$ blue beads, so the sum must be greater than or equal to $500$.
$$0.4x+0.6y\ge500$$The answer is A.
